memoryArtifacts.headline: Joan, daughter and heir of William de Welles
memoryArtifacts.description: An inquisition post mortem proof of age document identifies Joan’s father as William de Welles, her mother as Agnes, and her husband as Henry de Coggeshale, son of John de Coggeshale.

popularStory.headline: Joan, daughter and heir of William de Welles
popularStory.description: An inquisition post mortem proof of age document identifies Joan’s father as William de Welles, her mother as Agnes, and her husband as Henry de Coggeshale, son of John de Coggeshale.

zh.Coggeshall, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可可格沙拉爾
zh.Great Sampford, Essex, England: 英國艾可格亞特 桑普福德
zh.Newmarket, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可紐馬可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joane de Welles於1336年9月8日出生在英國素福爾可紐馬可特時，她的父親William de Welles28歲，母親Agnes Davie22歲。她於1358年與Henry de Coggeshall在英國英格蘭艾可可格沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1375年9月27日在英國艾可格亞特 桑普福德享年39歲。

zh-hans.Coggeshall, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可可格沙拉爾
zh-hans.Great Sampford, Essex, England: 英国艾可格亞特 桑普福德
zh-hans.Newmarket, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可紐馬可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joane de Welles于1336年9月8日出生在英国素福爾可紐馬可特时，她的父亲William de Welles28岁，母亲Agnes Davie22岁。她于1358年与Henry de Coggeshall在英国英格兰艾可可格沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1375年9月27日在英国艾可格亞特 桑普福德享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joane de Welles was born on 8 September 1336, in Newmarket, Suffolk, England, her father, William de Welles, was 28 and her mother, Agnes Davie, was 22. She married Henry de Coggeshall in 1358, in Coggeshall, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 27 September 1375, in Great Sampford, Essex, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joane de Welles est née le 8 septembre 1336, à Newmarket, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William de Welles, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes Davie, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Coggeshall en 1358, à Coggeshall, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 27 septembre 1375, à Great Sampford, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joane de Welles am 8. September 1336 in Newmarket, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Welles 28 und ihre Mutter Agnes Davie 22. Sie hat 1358 in Coggeshall, Essex, England, United Kingdom Henry de Coggeshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 27. September 1375 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Great Sampford, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joane de Welles è nata il il 8 settembre 1336 nel Newmarket, Suffolk, England, sua padre, William de Welles, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Agnes Davie, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Coggeshall nel 1358, nel Coggeshall, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 27 settembre 1375, nel Great Sampford, Essex, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.Coggeshall, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスコグジェシャル
ja.Great Sampford, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスグレアト サンプフォード
ja.Newmarket, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクニューマーケト
ja.Sandon, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスサンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joane de Wellesが1336年9月8日にイギリススフォルクニューマーケトで生まれた時，父William de Wellesは28歳，母Agnes Davieは22歳であった。1358年にイギリスイギリスエセックスコグジェシャルでHenry de Coggeshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1375年9月27日にイギリスエセックスグレアト サンプフォードで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joane de Welles(이)가 1336년 9월 8일 영국 수폴크 뉴마크트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Welles(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Davie(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코그샤에서 Henry de Coggeshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1375년 9월 27일 영국 에세스 그리트 샘p퍼드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.8 Sep 1336–27 September 1375: 8 de setembro de 1336–27 de setembro de 1375
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joane de Welles nasceu em 8 de setembro de 1336, em Newmarket, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Welles, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Davie, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Coggeshall em 1358, em Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1375, em Great Sampford, Essex, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joane de Welles родилась 8 сентября 1336 г. в местности нюмаркет, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Welles было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Davie, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Coggeshall в 1358 г. в местности когешолл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 27 сентября 1375 г. в местности грит сэмпфорд, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.8 Sep 1336–27 September 1375: 8 de septiembre de 1336–27 de septiembre de 1375
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joane de Welles nació el 8 de septiembre de 1336, en Newmarket, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Welles, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes Davie, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Henry de Coggeshall en 1358, en Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1375, en Great Sampford, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
